# HEARTBEAT.md

# Keep this file comments-only to skip heartbeat API calls entirely (zero tokens).

# Add tasks below ONLY when you want the agent to check something periodically.

# RULES:

# - If NOTHING needs attention, reply HEARTBEAT_OK. Period. No message.

# - Do NOT report "no stalled tasks" or "nothing to report" — that IS nothing, so HEARTBEAT_OK.

# - Do NOT run taskman on every heartbeat. Only check tasks when resuming a session or asked.

# - Do NOT edit this file to add recurring checks without Cody's approval.

# - Proactive checks (email, calendar) go in cron jobs, not here.
